# Errata {.unnumbered}

Please report all errata to [Jonathan Templin](mailto:jtempli@clemson.edu). We offer our apologies for all errata in the text, for which we are fully responsible. We would also like to thank everyone who has taken the time to alert us to our mistakes in the text.

| Page | Location | Text Appears As | Text Should Read |
|---|---|---|---|
| 17 | Figure 2.2 | Top right figure appears as "-" | Top right figure should appear as "+" |
| 17 | Figure 2.3 | Addition/Subtraction top right figure appears as "-" | Addition/Subtraction top right figure should appear as "+" |
| 61 | Table 4.9 | Typo: Title reads "Attribute Profiles for Attribute Hierarchy in Figure 4.9" | Correction: Title should read "Attribute Profiles for Attribute Hierarchy in Figure 4.2" |
| 63 | Table 4.10 | Typo: Title reads "Attribute Profiles for Attribute Hierarchy in Figure 4.9" | Correction: Title should read "Attribute Profiles for Attribute Hierarchy in Figure 4.2" |
| 63 | Table 4.11 | Typo: Title reads "Attribute Profiles for Attribute Hierarchy in Figure 4.9" | Correction: Title should read "Attribute Profiles for Attribute Hierarchy in Figure 4.2" |
| 89 | Figure 5.1 | Caption reads: "This figure shows two models with two latent variables..." | Caption should read: "This figure shows two models each with one latent variable..." |
| 89 | Line 7 | Typo: "nine Items" | Correction: "nine items" |
| 99 | Line 2 | Typo: "fulfils" | Correction (American English): "fulfills" |
| 101 | Line 14 | Typo (added word): "...is its two..." | Correction: "...is two..." |
| 102 | Line 7 | Incorrect Reference Year: "Unlu, 1999" | Correction: "Unlu, 2006" |
| 113 | Line 5 of Section 6.1 | Typo (added word): "...will first present..." | Correction: "...will present..." |
| 127 | Table 6.8 (column for Item 3) | Typo: Equation uses <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p127a.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3325" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p127a.gif" alt="" width="19" height="25" /></a> (throughout column) | Correction: Equation should use <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p127b-1.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3327" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p127b-1.gif" alt="" width="20" height="25" /></a> (throughout column) |
| 128 | 14 | Typo: in-line text for parameter reads <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p128a.png"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3329" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p128a.png" alt="" width="38" height="22" /></a> | Correction: in-line text for parameter should read <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p128b.png"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3330" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p128b.png" alt="" width="38" height="20" /></a> |
| 130 | Table 6.9 (column for Item 3) | Typo: Equation uses <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p127a.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3325" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p127a.gif" alt="" width="19" height="25" /></a> (throughout column) | Correction: Equation should use <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p127b-1.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3327" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p127b-1.gif" alt="" width="20" height="25" /></a> (throughout column) |
| 132 | Line 20 | Wrong definition: "...Attribute 3 ("The respondent has gambled with money that he or she intended to spend on something else.")" | Correction: "...Attribute 3 (“The respondent has lost relationships because of his or her gambling.")" |
| 132 | Line 25 | Wrong definition: "...gambling, spent money for gambling that was intended for something else..." | Correction: "...gambling, lost relationships due to gambling..." |
| 152 | Line 2 after Equation 7.2 | Typo: "...<a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p152a.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3331" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p152a.gif" alt="" width="21" height="22" /></a> is the main effect parameter associated with Attribute 2..." | Correction: "...<a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p152b.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3332" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p152b.gif" alt="" width="21" height="24" /></a> is the main effect parameter associated with Attribute 2..." |
| 153 | Line 4 | Typo: "... main effects <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p152c.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3333" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p152c.gif" alt="" width="21" height="22" /></a>" | Correction: "... main effects <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p152b.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3332" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p152b.gif" alt="" width="21" height="24" /></a>" |
| 156 | Line 4 | Typo: "...main effects and intercept parameters..." | Correction: "...main effects and interaction parameters..." |
| 156 | Equation 7.7 | Typo: wrong limits on second sum on right hand side - <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p156a.png"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3334" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p156a.png" alt="" width="367" height="54" /></a> | Correction: <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p156b.png"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3335" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p156b.png" alt="" width="382" height="53" /></a> |
| 159 | Table 7.7 note | Typo: "...guessing parameter; slipping parameter." | Correction: "...guessing parameter; <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p159a.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3336" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p159a.gif" alt="" width="13" height="20" /></a>, slipping parameter." |
| 163 | Table 7.9, Equations 2, 3, 4 | Typo: wrong subscript on intercept <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p163a.png"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3337" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p163a.png" alt="" width="106" height="40" /></a> | Correction: <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p163b.png"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3338" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p163b.png" alt="" width="116" height="45" /></a> |
| 175 | Line 3 after Equation 8.2 | Typo: "...is the <i>a</i>-way interaction effect parameter..." | Correction: "...is the <i>A</i>-way interaction effect parameter..." |
| 175 | Line 8 after Equation 8.2 | Typo: "...it is a log-linear for the latent..." | Correction: "...it is a log-linear model for the latent..." |
| 176 | Line 30 | Typo: wrong symbol for structural parameter <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p176a.png"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3339" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p176a.png" alt="" width="44" height="22" /></a> | Correction: <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p176b.png"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3340" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p176b.png" alt="" width="44" height="22" /></a> |
| 187 | Table 8.7; Tau vector, 8th row | Typo: .44 | Correction: 1.44 |
| 188 | Table 8.8 | Log-linear one-way model number of attributes: 2A | Log-linear one-way model number of attributes: A |
| 189 | Line 24 | Typo: "...or the BAC..." | Correction: "...or the BIC..." |
| 197 | Line 4 of Section 9.3.2 | Typo: "...CDM Analysis A for Chapter 9." | Correction: "...LCDM Analysis A for Chapter 9." |
| 207 | Line 2 | Typo: "...in Figure 9.8..." | Correction: "...in Table 9.6..." |
| 209 | Line 5 | Typo: "...the label for the intercept..." | Correction: "...the label for the intercept and main effect..." |
| 210 | Line 4 | Typo: "...Attribute 1, and l9_12 for Attribute 2..." | Correction: "...Attribute 1, and l4_12 for Attribute 2..." |
| 210 | Item 4 Syntax, Lines 3 and 4 | Typo: l4_11 and l4_12 are on incorrect lines | Correction: Equation for t4_2 should be "-(l4_0+l4_12);", Equation for t4_3 should be "-(l4_0+l4_11);" |
| 217 | Line 15 | Missing negative sign | Correction: Equation should read "...exp(-2.437)/(1+exp(-2.437)) = .08" |
| 222 | Line 4 of Section 9.8.2 | Typo: "It is..." | Correction: "...the label for the intercept and main effect..." |
| 224 | Line 3 | Typo: "...DINO model..." | Correction: "...DINA model..." |
| 224 | Line 6 | Typo: "...DINO model..." | Correction: "...DINA model..." |
| 235 | Line 14 | Typo: "...Equation 10.2..." | Correction: "...Equation 10.3..." |
| 238 | Line 9 | Typo: "...Equation 10.2..." | Correction: "...Equation 10.3..." |
| 243 | Line 6 | Typo: <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p243a.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3341" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p243a.gif" alt="" width="70" height="23" /></a> | Correction: <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p243b.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3342" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p243b.gif" alt="" width="31" height="22" /></a> = 0.50 |
| 261 | Line 8 | Typo: <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p261a.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3343" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p261a.gif" alt="" width="45" height="20" /></a> | Correction: <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p261b.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3344" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p261b.gif" alt="" width="45" height="20" /></a> |
| 262 | Line 12 | Typo: "Similar..." | Correction: "Similarly..." |
| 303 | Line 16 | Typo: "Table 13.15" | Correction: "Table 13.16" |
| 304 | Title of Table 13.17 | Typo: <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p304a.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3345" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p304a.gif" alt="" width="23" height="25" /></a> | Correction: <a href="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p304b.gif"><img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-3346" src="https://jonathantemplin.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/01/p304b.gif" alt="" width="20" height="25" /></a> |
| 334 | Missing reference |  | Henson, R., &amp; Douglas, J. (2005). Test construction for cognitive diagnosis. Applied Psychological Measurement, 29, 262-277. |
